---
title: "Course PM — Test Course (TEST101)"
canvas:
  type: study_guide
  preprocess: true
  published: true
  front_page: true
  pdf:
    target_module: "Course Documents"
    filename: "CoursePM-Test101.pdf"
    title: "Course PM (PDF)"
    published: true
---

# Introduction

Welcome to the Test Course (TEST101). This is a 7.5 ECTS course used for
end-to-end testing of the Canvas sync tool.

# Schedule

| Week | Topic | Activity |
|:-----|:------|:---------|
| 1 | Introduction | Lecture, Lab 1 |
| 2 | Basics | Lecture, Lab 2 |
| 3 | Advanced | Project work |

# Examination

| Component | Credits | Grade |
|:----------|:--------|:------|
| Project | 4.5 ECTS | 5/4/3/F |
| Labs | 3 ECTS | P/F |

# Grading Criteria

| ILO | Fail | 3 | 4 | 5 |
|:----|:-----|:--|:--|:--|
| Understanding | Cannot explain basics | Explains core concepts | Relates concepts to each other | Analyzes in depth |
| Application | Does not function | Works and can be explained | Well-structured solution | Handles edge cases |

# Teaching Staff

| Name | Role | Image | Link |
|:-----|:-----|:------|:-----|
| Test Teacher | Course responsible | placeholder.png | https://example.com/teacher |

# Research Connection

The research connection is described in the education plan.
